zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Darrell於1419年1月10日出生在英國維爾爾利特萊可特 帕克時，他的父親Sir William Darell35歲，母親Elizabeth de Calston18歲。他於1452年與Margaret Stourton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1474年8月6日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年55歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾拉姆斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Darrell于1419年1月10日出生在英国維爾爾利特萊可特 帕克时，他的父亲Sir William Darell35岁，母亲Elizabeth de Calston18岁。他于1452年与Margaret Stourton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1474年8月6日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年55岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾拉姆斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Darrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from Airelle in Calvados, France, or Airel in La Manche, Normandy. Compare Dorrell .

variants.name: Dural
meanings: Turkish: ornamental name or nickname from dural ‘always the same’.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Darrell was born on 10 January 1419, in Littlecote Park, Wiltshire, England, his father, Sir William Darell, was 35 and his mother, Elizabeth de Calston, was 18. He married Margaret Stourton in 1452. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 6 August 1474, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Darrell est né le 10 janvier 1419, à Littlecote Park, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Darell, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Calston, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Stourton en 1452. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 6 août 1474, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Darrell am 10. Januar 1419 in Littlecote Park, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Darell 35 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Calston 18. Er hat 1452 Margaret Stourton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 6. August 1474 im Alter von 55 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Darrell(이)가 1419년 1월 10일 영국 윌츠히르 리틀렉트 박에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Darell(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Calston(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1452년 Margaret Stourton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1474년 8월 6일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 램스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Darrell nasceu em 10 de janeiro de 1419, em Littlecote Park, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Darell, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Calston, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Stourton em 1452. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1474, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Darrell родился 10 января 1419 г. в местности литлекот парк, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Darell было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Calston, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Stourton в 1452 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 6 августа 1474 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности рамсбури, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir George Darrell nació el 10 de enero de 1419, en Littlecote Park, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Darell, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Calston, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Margaret Stourton en 1452. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1474, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
